title: Reviewers feature and universal gifts page

texts: Added a min ratings slider to the Community Rankings page so identities or E.G.Os that don't have enough ratings don't get ranked. Defaults to 25 ratings.
Added a Reviewers tab to the Community Rankings page allowing users to view the rankings and reviews of other users. It also allows you to see your own ranking.
Added reviews to a user's profile page. This only displays ratings that have actual reviews. A button is included to navigate to the rankings page where you can view all of the user's ratings.
Overhauled the Universal Gifts page adding a search feature and making the list more comprehensive.
Fixed modal behavior to close on navigation to another page.
Changed initial page load behavior to redirect users to the setup username page if they never set a username.
